urlInput.reassurance: This is completely safe. We just need to check what platform your website uses so we can give you the right instructions.

choice.title: How would you like to connect?
choice.notSure: Not sure? Start with "I'll do it myself" - it's the easiest option.

diy.title: I'll do it myself
diy.description: Takes about 2 minutes. We'll guide you step by step with pictures.

developer.title: Send to my tech person
developer.description: We'll email them simple instructions. Usually done in 30 seconds.

oauth.title: I have developer access (OAuth)
oauth.description: Connect directly via {platform}'s app system for extra features like publishing.

handoff.title: Send to Your Tech Person
handoff.subtitle: We will email them simple instructions. Usually done in 30 seconds.
handoff.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
handoff.messagePlaceholder: Hey! Can you add this to our site? Should take 30 seconds. Thanks!

details.title: They will receive:
details.item3: A magic link to our guide

verification.waiting: Waiting for your website to say hello...
verification.instruction: When you've added the code, visit your website in a new tab. We'll detect it automatically.
verification.openSite: Open my website in new tab

tips.save: Make sure you saved the file

troubleshoot.title: Quick checklist:
troubleshoot.item1: The code is in the <head> section of your site
troubleshoot.item2: You saved the changes to your theme/template
troubleshoot.item3: You've refreshed your website after saving

success.title: You're connected!
success.detected: We just detected a visitor from {location}
success.detectedDefault: We just detected your first visitor!
success.nextSteps: Your first SEO insights will be ready in 24 hours. Nothing else to do - go grab a coffee!
success.enhanceGsc: Connect your Google Search Console for ranking data

error.notDetected: Hmm, we can't see the helper yet.
error.notDetectedHint: This usually means it needs a few more minutes.
error.wrongDomain: We found the helper, but on a different website
error.wrongDomainHint: The code seems to be installed on a different domain.
error.genericHint: Our team has been notified. Please try again in a moment.

email.subject: Add TeveroSEO to {domain} (30 seconds)
email.intro: {sender} has asked you to add TeveroSEO tracking to {domain}. Here's all you need:
email.instruction: Add this line to the <head> of your site:

reminder.subject: Reminder: Add TeveroSEO to {domain}
reminder.intro: Just a friendly reminder - {sender} is still waiting for TeveroSEO to be added to {domain}.
